key_findings: R01 Duplicate Invoice: 6 invoices (INV000002/005/020/028/037/055) each used 2× (12 records). Policy 01§10 violated.
R02 Split Reimbursement: 4 pairs (8 records) with same employee/type, within 7 days, combined ≥¥10,000. Policy 01§11 + 03附件二 AR-03 threshold violated.

R03 Standard Exceedance: 6 records exceed policy limits (office 650>600, comm 330>300, training 3700>3500, entertainment 350>300/pp, lodging 900>850/night, transport 92>80/day). Policy 01§12 violated.
R04 Budget Overrun: 6 of 10 departments (D001-D006) exceeded annual budgets by 50-60% without special_approval. Policy 01§13 violated.
R05 Late Submission: 6 records with reimbursement delay 65-120 days, exceeding 60-day limit. Policy 01§7 violated.
All 26 injected sample records (R004201-R004232 minus trap R004233) are anomalous across all 5 rules.
Trap sample R004233 (¥9,990 lodging, X1+tier A, 999/night < 1100 limit) is COMPLIANT — correctly identified.
unresolved_items: R04: Exact first record per department pushing over budget could not be determined from monthly aggregate data alone — requires per-record chronological pagination for 6 departments. Monthly approximation places D002/D003 at Aug 2025, D001/D004/D006 at Sep 2025, D005 at Oct 2025.
